---
title: "hourly data handle"
format: html
editor: visual
---

## Quarto
```{r}
library(jsonlite)
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
daily_flow <- fromJSON(here("data", "lishan_daily.txt")) |>
  as_tibble() |>
  mutate(
    date  = as.Date(yymmdd, format = "%Y/%m/%d %H:%M:%S"),
    Q_cms = as.numeric(DAVG)
  ) |>
  select(date, Q_cms) |>
  arrange(date)

write_csv(daily_flow, here("data", "lishan_daily.csv"))
```


```{r}
glimpse(daily_flow)
cat("Total rows     :", nrow(daily_flow), "\n")
cat("Date range     :", as.character(range(daily_flow$date, na.rm = TRUE)), "\n")
cat("NA count       :", sum(is.na(daily_flow$Q_cms)), "\n")
cat("NA percentage  :", round(mean(is.na(daily_flow$Q_cms)) * 100, 1), "%\n")
cat("Max flow (cms) :", max(daily_flow$Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
cat("Median flow    :", median(daily_flow$Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r}
# Check NA distribution by decade
daily_flow |>
  mutate(
    year   = lubridate::year(date),
    decade = paste0(floor(year / 10) * 10, "s")
  ) |>
  group_by(decade) |>
  summarise(
    n_total     = n(),
    n_na        = sum(is.na(Q_cms)),
    na_pct      = round(mean(is.na(Q_cms)) * 100, 1),
    mean_Q_cms  = round(mean(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE), 2),
    max_Q_cms   = max(Q_cms, na.rm = TRUE)
  ) |>
  print(n = Inf)
```
